originalAlarm.description: `length` is read without initialization during the call to `reiserfs_security_init()`.

reasoning: Known VBDB bug at L31 (ERROR comment). When SECURITY=F, security_old_inode_init_security() (L14-17) returns 0 without writing to *len. In reiserfs_security_init(), *length at L31 is read uninitialized (length was declared but never initialized in reiserfs_create()). The alarm at L41 (the call site) traces to this uninitialized read. Bug requires SECURITY=F. PC = SECURITY=F exactly matches. Classification: TRUE.
